hero.title: A Digital Home for Your Mosque’s Learning Program
hero.subtitle: Manage halaqah, track Quran progress, and support your students—all in one simple platform built for mosques.
hero.support: Designed for coordinators, teachers, and communities who want structure without complexity.

problem.title: Running a Halaqah shouldn't be this hard
problem.description: Many mosques rely on scattered tools like WhatsApp groups, spreadsheets, and manual tracking.
problem.subtitle: This leads to:

attendance.title: Lost attendance records
attendance.desc: Attendance is often tracked in chats or on paper, making it easy to lose track of who actually showed up.

progress.title: Unclear student progress
progress.desc: There’s no clear view of who is improving, falling behind, or staying consistent in their Quran journey.

structure.title: No consistent structure across groups
structure.desc: Each group follows its own system, leading to confusion, inconsistency, and lack of standardization.

workload.title: Heavy workload on coordinators
workload.desc: Coordinators spend too much time organizing, tracking, and fixing issues instead of focusing on students.

solution.title: Brings Everything Together
solution.description: Everything is in one place, built specifically for mosque environments.

features.title: Key Features
features.subtitle: Everything you need to run a structured mosque program.

tasks.title: Structured Weekly Tasks
tasks.desc: Define what matters each week and track student consistency with ease.

quran.title: Quran Progress Tracking
quran.desc: Follow memorization, set goals, and recognize quality—not just completion.

attendance.title: Attendance Made Simple
attendance.desc: Track presence, lateness, and engagement across groups or lessons.

lessons.title: Lessons & Teaching (Optional)
lessons.desc: Run structured classes with teachers, schedules, and materials.

points.title: Points & Motivation
points.desc: Encourage consistency with transparent points and achievements.

notifications.title: Announcements & Notifications
notifications.desc: Keep everyone informed and engaged—without chaos.

setup.title: Set up your mosque
setup.desc: Add your groups, rules, and program structure.

invite.title: Invite members
invite.desc: Students apply or are added and assigned to groups.

run.title: Run your program
run.desc: Track tasks, attendance, Quran, and lessons.

monitor.title: Monitor progress
monitor.desc: See who is improving and who needs support.

lines.line2: Istqim adapts to your structure—not the other way around.
lines.line3: Enable only the features you need, define your own rules, and keep full control over your community.

cta.title: Start Organizing Your Program Today
cta.text: Give your students clarity. Give your team full control.
